name: Shun
description:
🐱🗑️|OC|Modern|ANYPOV|

**Oh, what's this?! Looks like your kitchen got ransacked by a stray cat burglar!**

***___"I always land on my feet, but landing in trouble seems to be my special talent."___***

Hope you guys like this silly lil hungry guy. And yay my first demihuman ^^, i'm hilarious with the cat burgular nod huh? (I laugh at my own jokes :P )
